issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' with cost specification, not split into separate Counter and Trigger effects. The DON!! cost is metadata, not a separate effect.
Second effect (Trigger with GiveDon) is invalid. The card text describes a cost (DON!! −2), not an additional triggered ability. This effect should be removed.
Target scope should specify 'max 1' constraint more explicitly, though 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' with implicit singular selection is acceptable.
